General.Name: Lushang Life Services Co Ltd
General.Description: Lushang Life Services Co., Ltd. provides property management services in the People's Republic of China. It also offers value-added services to non-property owners, including design, landscaping, preliminary property management, and pre-delivery services, as well as other customized services comprising repair and maintenance, and property transaction assistance services. In addition, the company provides community value-added services to property owners and residents, such as parking space management, utility management, and community space and resource management services, as well as community living services that consist of customized waste cleaning and housekeeping services. Lushang Life Services Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Jinan, China.
